description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.4 Docker image with a global before_script that runs bundle install and a JEKYLL_ENV=production variable. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d public/ --config _config.yml,_config-gitlab.yml, stores the resulting test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs jekyll build -d public/ --config _config.yml,_config-gitlab.yml, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. Ensure the pipeline respects the stage order and artifact paths as specified.
